name: rb-heroku-mia-slack-worldcup26
description: Slack app showcasing Heroku Managed Inference Agents with World Cup 2026 features

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Slack app signing secret for request verification

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.description: Slack App-Level Token for Socket Mode (xapp-...)

INFERENCE_MODEL_ID.description: Inference model ID for chat completions

BROADCAST_CHANNEL_ID.description: Slack channel ID for match broadcast cards

FOOTBALL_API_KEY.description: API key for live match data

WEB_SEARCH_API_KEY.description: API key for web search provider fallback

HIGHLIGHTS_API_KEY.description: API key for fetching highlight playlists
